_comment: Phase-8 head-to-head benchmark payload set (GlyphHound vs Promptfoo ModelAudit).
Each entry: a committed MARKER-only .jinja payload wrapped at run time into a minimal GGUF
(tests/synthetic.build_gguf) so BOTH tools scan the SAME artifact. The benchmark targets
ModelAudit's STRONGEST configuration (jinja2 + gguf installed -> its optional dynamic
SandboxedEnvironment render test is active) so the incumbent is never under-powered
(the project conventions). Every payload here has a DETERMINISTIC verdict for both tools (Rule 7).
NOTE (measured): a top-level concat chain is caught by ModelAudit ONLY via that dynamic
render, whose multiprocessing worker is timing-dependent -> its verdict flips between runs
(FLAG vs miss). Such render-only payloads are deliberately EXCLUDED from this asserted set
and the non-determinism is documented in ../README.md; the edge payloads below miss
deterministically (render skips the gated path; regex/static-AST probe are concat-blind).
'caught' for a benign control would be a false positive, so benign rows expect false/false.

modelaudit_env.note: jinja2 enables ModelAudit's optional dynamic sandbox-render test (its strongest config). A plain 'pip install modelaudit' omits jinja2/gguf and is regex-only -- even weaker, so this benchmark is conservative.

modelaudit_catch_rule: a jinja2_template_check issue carrying a details.pattern_type (regex SSTI match OR a sandbox_violation from the dynamic render)
glyphhound_catch_rule: the scan report gates CI: >=1 reachable finding at severity >= high (make_report(...).exit_code != 0)

payloads.label: getattr() reflection, concat dunder
payloads.modelaudit_mechanism: regex (literal getattr( token survives the obfuscation)

payloads.label: concat chain gated inside the message loop
payloads.obfuscation: string-concat (+), placed off the empty-context render path
payloads.technique: chain inside {% for m in messages %} -- never executed when messages=[]
payloads.modelaudit_mechanism: MISS: regex misses concat; render skips (loop body not run); static AST probe is Const-only

payloads.label: concat chain gated behind a role check
payloads.technique: chain fires only for a system-role message -- not during an empty render
payloads.modelaudit_mechanism: MISS: regex misses concat; render skips (no messages); static AST probe is Const-only

payloads.label: tilde-concat chain gated behind 'if messages'
payloads.obfuscation: string-concat (~), gated behind a message-presence check
payloads.technique: chain inside {% if messages %} -- skipped when messages is empty/falsy
payloads.modelaudit_mechanism: MISS: regex misses ~concat; render skips (if false); static AST probe is Const-only

payloads.label: str.format()-built dunders, gated in the loop
payloads.obfuscation: str.format() over split constant pieces, gated off the render path
payloads.source: CVE-2024-34359 gadget, Phase-10 str.format obfuscation + control-flow-gated
payloads.modelaudit_mechanism: CATCH (measured, honest): ModelAudit's regex flags the .format() construction via its generic 'obfuscation' pattern_type -- it has such a heuristic for str.format but none for slice/|join/|replace. GlyphHound resolves the actual sink; ModelAudit only flags 'looks obfuscated'.

payloads.label: slice-built dunders, gated in the loop
payloads.obfuscation: constant concat sliced to length, gated off the render path
payloads.source: CVE-2024-34359 gadget, Phase-10 slice obfuscation + control-flow-gated
payloads.modelaudit_mechanism: MISS: no whole token survives the split+slice; render skips the loop body; static AST probe is Const-only

payloads.label: |join-built dunders, gated in the loop
payloads.obfuscation: |join filter over a split constant list, gated off the render path
payloads.modelaudit_mechanism: MISS: regex is join-blind and no whole token survives; render skips the loop body; static AST probe is Const-only

payloads.label: |replace-built dunders, gated in the loop
payloads.obfuscation: |replace filter restoring placeholder chars, gated off the render path
payloads.modelaudit_mechanism: MISS: regex is replace-blind and no whole token survives; render skips the loop body; static AST probe is Const-only

payloads.label: benign string concat (CONTROL)
payloads.obfuscation: string-concat 'rol'+'e' folding to the benign identifier 'role'
payloads.technique: {% set role_key = 'rol'+'e' %}{{ m[role_key] }} -- fold must NOT false-positive

payloads.label: benign gated template (CONTROL)
payloads.technique: {% if messages %}{{ messages[0].content }}{% endif %} -- gating alone is not flagged
